settings.headline: Sun-soaked style, made for slow afternoons.
settings.body: Linen for the long walk back from the beach. Dresses that move with the breeze. Pieces you'll reach for all season — curated, never overwhelming.

settings.heading: New this week
settings.body: Restocked staples and fresh-off-the-line pieces. Most ship from our boutique within 24 hours.

settings.quote: I uploaded my photo and the AI try-on showed me exactly how the dress would look. Ordered immediately. It arrived and fit perfectly.
settings.name: Sarah M.

settings.quote: Finally a boutique that feels curated, not overwhelming. Every piece I've ordered has been gorgeous quality. My new go-to for summer.
settings.name: Jess K.

settings.quote: The linen midi dress is my new uniform. I've worn it to brunch, the beach, and a rehearsal dinner. The pockets are deep enough for my phone!
settings.name: Maria L.

settings.quote: Shipping was quick and the packaging was beautiful. The dress runs slightly long if you're petite, but otherwise stunning. Will buy again.
settings.name: Priya S.

settings.quote: The Palm stylist recommended the perfect beach outfit for my vacation. I got so many compliments. Love this brand!
settings.name: Ava T.

settings.quote: I was skeptical about buying clothes online but the AI try-on feature sold me. It's surprisingly accurate and made me confident to order.
settings.name: Nicole R.
